# mtncloud_execute_schedule (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud execute schedule: a cron schedule that jobs can run on. All attributes update in place — renaming or changing the cron never recreates the schedule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_execute_schedule" "nightly" {
  name     = "nightly-2am"
  cron     = "0 2 * * *"
  timezone = "Africa/Lagos"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cron` (String) Cron expression, e.g. `0 0 * * *`.
- `name` (String) Name of the schedule.
- `timezone` (String) Schedule timezone, e.g. `Africa/Lagos`.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the schedule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `visibility` (String) Schedule visibility: `private` or `public`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the schedule.
